feat.name: Redirecting Draft
feat.text: You flap your wings to blow arrows off course. You or the triggering ally gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, you redirected the attack's flight path.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You or an ally within 10 feet of you is the target of a ranged physical Strike.
